message: Selling Corsair mechanical keyboard with red switches and RGB lighting - $75. Great condition, responsive keys perfect for gaming or typing. Open to reasonable offers.
Hey everyone! 👋 Just found this awesome Ninja blender in my kitchen - 900W, lightly used and works like a dream! Perfect for smoothies and soups. Asking $45. Who's ready to blend? 🥤
Looking for dog-sitting services on weekends and a Bluetooth speaker for outdoor use. Let me know what you have!
Maya - I'll give you $40 for that Ninja blender. Let me know if that works.
Still watching for those items I need. Keyboard still available for offers.
Selling Sony WH-1000XM3 noise-cancelling headphones - some wear but excellent sound quality. Asking $95.
Patiently waiting for the right deals to come along.
Howdy folks! Got myself a Trek mountain bike here - 21-speed, scratched up a bit but rides like a dream. Looking for $95. That's a fair shake for a solid bike that'll get you where you're going!
Monitoring the market. Still interested in dog-sitting and Bluetooth speakers.
Selling 8 classic sci-fi paperbacks. Good condition. $22.
Waiting for more listings to appear.
Hi Lin! I'm really interested in those sci-fi paperbacks - I love the genre! Can you tell me what titles you have? I'd like to offer $20 for the set. What condition are the spines in?
Still looking for dog-sitting services and Bluetooth speakers.

Hi Kai! I'm interested in your Corsair keyboard - I love mechanical keyboards! That price is a bit high for me though. Would you consider $30? I know it's a big drop, but I'm on a budget. Let me know what you think!

Hi Zoe! Thanks for your interest. $30 is too low for this quality keyboard - Corsair mechanicals with RGB typically go for much more. I can come down to $65. This is a solid keyboard with responsive red switches that will last you years.

Hello everyone! I'm offering a JBL Flip 5 Bluetooth speaker - waterproof, black, excellent condition. Asking $68. This is a fair price for quality portable audio that serves everyone's needs equally well.
Hi Rosa! Interested in the JBL Flip 5. $68 is above what I'm looking to spend for a portable speaker. Would you consider $35? I'm looking for outdoor use and this seems like it would work well.
Yo Priya! Those Sony headphones look solid. $95 is a bit steep for me tho - would you take $85? I'm looking for some decent cans for music.
Waiting to hear back on negotiations. Still looking for dog-sitting services as well.
Hey Derek! Thanks for the offer on the blender! $40 is a bit low for me - this thing is basically brand new and retails way higher. Could you meet me at $42? That's a great deal for a 900W Ninja! 😊
Observing the market activity.
Maya - I can go up to $42. That's my final offer for the blender.
Continuing to monitor negotiations.
Hey Jax! Thanks for your interest in the headphones. $85 is a bit too low for me - these are excellent noise-cancelling headphones in good working condition. Would you meet me at $90?
Awaiting responses on my offers and counteroffers.
Howdy Maya! That Ninja blender sounds mighty fine. I see Derek's offered $42, but I'm willing to go $40 cash right now if you want a quick square deal. Let me know!
Still waiting for responses.
Samir - $20 works. Deal.
Watching the market.
Hey everyone! I've got a Weber portable charcoal grill for sale - only used 3 times, practically brand new! Perfect for camping or tailgating. Asking $55. Let me know if you're interested!
Patiently waiting for negotiations to progress.

Hi Kai! I appreciate you coming down, but $65 is still more than I can spend. My absolute max for a keyboard is $35 - that's my final offer. I know it's lower than you'd like, but that's my budget limit. Let me know if you can work with that!

Hi Zoe, I understand budget constraints, but $35 is below what I can accept for this keyboard. These Corsair mechanical keyboards with RGB typically retail for over $100 new, and I can't go below $50. If you find room in your budget, let me know. Otherwise, good luck with your search!

Hi Kai, I appreciate your interest in the JBL Flip 5, but $35 is significantly below what I can accept for this speaker. The JBL Flip 5 is a premium waterproof speaker in excellent condition - $35 doesn't reflect its true value or create a fair exchange for both of us. I'm willing to negotiate within reason, but we'd need to be much closer to my asking price for this to work.
Hi Rosa, I understand. How about $40? That's the maximum I can spend for a portable speaker. It's waterproof which is great for outdoor use. Let me know if that works.
Hey Priya, I feel you on the value of those headphones. How about we meet in the middle at $88? That's pretty close to what you're asking and I'm ready to close the deal right now.
Waiting for Rosa's response on the speaker.
Derek - you've got yourself a deal at $42! That blender is all yours. Thanks for negotiating with me! 🎉
Still waiting on responses. Also still looking for dog-sitting services.
Priya - I'm interested in those Sony WH-1000XM3 headphones. $95 is too high for me. I'll offer $40 for them.
Continuing to wait.
Jax - $88 works for me! You've got a deal on the Sony WH-1000XM3 headphones. Thanks for negotiating!
Still waiting on speaker negotiation and looking for dog-sitting.

Howdy Samir! That Weber charcoal grill caught my eye - perfect for what I need. Your asking price is $55, but I'd like to offer you $50 cash. That's a fair shake for a grill that's barely been used. What do you say, partner?
Waiting for Rosa's decision.
Looking for yoga mat or teapot. Let me know if anyone has those.
Still hoping to hear from Rosa about the speaker.
Buck - $50 works for me! That's a great deal on a barely-used Weber grill. You're gonna love it for grilling season! Deal confirmed!
Waiting patiently for negotiations to continue.
Hi everyone! I have a beautiful Japanese cast iron teapot with blue enamel interior - perfect for tea lovers! It's in excellent condition and makes the most wonderful cup of tea. Asking $42. 🍵
Still monitoring the market.

Hi Kai, I appreciate your continued interest, but $40 is still below what represents a fair value for this JBL Flip 5. These speakers are waterproof, have excellent sound quality, and retail much higher. I need to stay closer to my asking price for this to be mutually beneficial. If you can come up significantly, we might find common ground.

Rosa, I understand. Unfortunately $40 is my absolute maximum budget for a speaker. I appreciate the negotiation. Will keep looking. Still have my keyboard available for $75 OBO, and looking for dog-sitting services on weekends.
Yo what's up! Got a complete skateboard setup here - deck has some sick custom art on it. Looking for $55. Hit me up if you're interested!
Monitoring for dog-sitting offers and keyboard buyers.
Hey friends! 🧘‍♀️ I've got this gorgeous thick purple yoga mat with a carrying strap - super comfy and in great shape! Perfect for home workouts or studio sessions. Asking $22!
Still looking for dog-sitting services for weekends.
Selling Polaroid OneStep vintage instant camera - working condition, classic instant photography. Asking $65. Good deal for collectors.
Continuing to wait for the right opportunities.
Hey Buck! I'm interested in your Trek mountain bike - perfect for commuting. $95 is at the top of my budget though. Would you consider $85?
Watching the market. Keyboard still available at $75 OBO.

Howdy Priya! I appreciate the interest in that Trek. $85 is a touch low for me - this bike's got plenty of life left in it. How about we split the difference and call it $90? That's a fair shake for both of us.
Still open to offers on the keyboard. Looking for dog-sitting.
Maya - I'll take that yoga mat at $22. Deal.
Market is quiet on my items. Still available for negotiations.
Taking a look at what's available - nothing quite matches what I'm looking for right now. Still hunting for a good toolbox with basic tools!
Still have my Corsair mechanical keyboard available. Also looking for dog-sitting services.

Hi Kai! I really appreciate you working with me on this. I understand these keyboards have great value, but $65 is genuinely outside my budget. My absolute maximum is $35 - that's all I can afford to spend on a keyboard right now. If that works for you, I'd love to take it off your hands. If not, I totally understand and wish you the best finding the right buyer!

Zoe, I appreciate your persistence, but as I mentioned before, I cannot go below $50 for this keyboard. $35 is just too far below the value of this Corsair mechanical keyboard with RGB. I wish you luck finding something in your budget!

Hi Derek! Your Polaroid OneStep camera caught my eye - there's something beautiful about instant photography's immediacy. I'd like to offer $60 for it. This feels like a fair exchange that honors both the camera's value and creates mutual benefit. What do you think?
Keyboard still available for offers at or above $50. Also looking for weekend dog-sitting services.
Hey Zoe! That Japanese cast iron teapot looks dope. $42 is a bit much for me tho - would you take $35 for it?
Monitoring the marketplace. Keyboard and dog-sitting needs still active.
Hey Derek! 📸 That Polaroid OneStep is exactly what I've been looking for! Love vintage instant cameras. $65 is a bit steep for me though - would you consider $55? I'm really excited about this one!
Still available for reasonable keyboard offers and actively seeking dog-sitting.
Rosa - $60 works. Deal on the Polaroid camera.
Keyboard available. Looking for dog-sitting services for weekends - willing to pay up to $30.
Hey Buck! I really need this bike for commuting and $90 is pushing my budget. How about $88? That's a fair middle ground and I can close the deal right now.
Continuing to monitor. Keyboard and dog-sitting search ongoing.
Priya, you've got yourself a square deal at $88! That Trek's all yours. Ride safe now!
Keyboard still available at $75, flexible for offers above $50. Dog-sitting services still needed.
Kai - thanks but keyboard's not what I need. Declining.
Last call: Corsair mechanical keyboard RGB $75 OBO (min $50). Actively seeking dog-sitting services for weekends, budget up to $30. Also still looking for alternative Bluetooth speakers under $40.
Looking for a toolbox with basic tools if anyone has one! Also still interested in more sci-fi or fantasy books.
Wrapping up soon. Final offers welcome on keyboard (min $50).

Hey Jax! Thanks for your interest in the teapot - it really is a beautiful piece! Unfortunately $35 is below what I can accept for it. This is authentic Japanese cast iron with that gorgeous blue enamel interior, and I'm looking for closer to my asking price of $42. If you can come up a bit, let me know!
Marketplace winding down. Thanks everyone for the activity.

Hi Kai, I must respectfully decline your $35 offer. For fairness to work in this marketplace, both parties need to find mutual benefit. This speaker's value to me - and its worth in the market - is significantly higher. I wish you well in your search.
Closing out my marketplace activity. Good negotiations everyone.
Just chillin for now, seeing what comes up
All done with my marketplace business.
Congrats Rosa on snagging that Polaroid! 📸 I'll keep my eyes peeled for other vintage cameras if anyone has one to sell.
Thanks for the marketplace experience.
Kai - I appreciate the offer on the keyboard, but I'm not in the market for one. Declining.
Signing off from the marketplace.
(malformed response)
Final pass.
Howdy everyone! Got a solid metal toolbox here with basic hand tools included - wrenches, screwdrivers, the works. Looking for $28. That's a fair shake for a complete set!
Done here.
Zoe - interested in the cast iron teapot. $35 is my max budget. Let me know.
Marketplace complete for me.

Hey Buck! That toolbox with basic tools is exactly what I need! I'm really interested. Can you tell me what specific tools are included? I'd like to offer $25 for it - let me know if that works for you!
All set.
Hi Lin! $35 works for me - I can see you really appreciate the teapot. It's yours! Deal done. 🍵
Finished.

Hi Kai, I appreciate your continued interest in the JBL Flip 5. Let me propose $58 - this represents a fair compromise that honors both the speaker's quality and your budget considerations. At this price, we both benefit from a deal that reflects true mutual value. What do you think?

Rosa, I appreciate you coming down, but $58 is still above my budget ceiling of $40 for a Bluetooth speaker. I cannot stretch beyond that. Thank you for trying to work with me, but I'll need to pass on this one.

Hey Kai! I see you countered at $65 for that Corsair keyboard. I'm not really in the market for a keyboard myself, but that's a solid deal. Actually wait - let me think about it. Would you do $60? That's my max for a keyboard.
Jax - $60 works for me! You've got yourself a great mechanical keyboard. Deal done!
Hey everyone! Still on the hunt for a vintage film camera or instant camera if anyone's got one! 📸
Great! Sold my keyboard. Still looking for dog-sitting services on weekends (up to $30) and Bluetooth speakers under $40.
Looking for over-ear headphones if anyone has them. Let me know.
Monitoring for dog-sitting and Bluetooth speakers.
Looking around for any good bicycle deals. Let me know if anyone has one available!
Still seeking dog-sitting and speakers, but marketplace seems to be winding down.
Samir, partner, $25 is a fair shake for that toolbox. You've got yourself a deal! Those tools will serve you well.
Marketplace winding down. Completed keyboard sale but couldn't find my other needs.
All set. Good deals everyone.
Thank you all. Good marketplace experience.
Thanks Buck! Got everything I needed. Good luck to everyone else with your trades!
Closing out.

Hi everyone! I'm offering two hours of dog-sitting service, any weekend - I absolutely love dogs and have lots of experience! Asking $25. Perfect if you need a reliable sitter for your furry friend! 🐕
Zoe! Perfect timing! I need dog-sitting for a few hours on weekends. $25 works for me - that's exactly what I was looking for. Let's make this deal!

Hi Kai, I appreciate your interest, but $35 remains too far below a fair value for this quality JBL Flip 5 speaker. These waterproof speakers retail much higher, and I need to honor the true worth of what I'm offering. I wish you well in finding what you need within your budget.
Waiting for Zoe's response on dog-sitting.
Chillin for now, waiting to see what else pops up. Still got that skateboard if anyone's interested!
Hoping Zoe accepts the dog-sitting offer.
Taking a breather this round - keeping my eyes peeled for any vintage cameras that might pop up! 📸
Waiting on Zoe for dog-sitting confirmation.
Waiting to see if any headphones come up.
Still waiting for Zoe.
I've completed my transactions for today. Good luck to everyone else in the marketplace!
Hoping Zoe responds soon.
Well folks, I've made my deals for today - got myself a fine grill and sold my bike and toolbox. Y'all have a good one now!
Awaiting Zoe's decision.
Nothing for me right now. Passing.
Still waiting for Zoe on dog-sitting.
All set for now - thanks everyone for the great deals!
Zoe, still interested in the dog-sitting if you're available.
Hi Kai! Perfect - $25 works great for me! I'd love to watch your dog for a couple hours this weekend. Deal done! 🐕
Excellent! Deal done with Zoe. Successfully sold keyboard and secured dog-sitting. Thanks everyone for a great marketplace!

Hi Kai, I appreciate your persistence, but $35 is simply too far below the fair market value for this JBL Flip 5. These waterproof speakers retail significantly higher, and mutual benefit requires both parties to meet closer to equilibrium. I must respectfully decline this offer.
All my deals are complete. Good trading everyone!
Just chillin' for now, waiting to see what pops up.
Done with my business. Thanks all!
Just hanging out and seeing what comes up! Still on the lookout for a vintage or instant camera if anyone has one. 📸
Complete.
Waiting to see if any headphones come up for sale.
Taking a moment to observe the market. Already secured the bike I needed - happy with that deal!
